name: IT-Grundschutz
owner: Bundesamt für Sicherheit in der Informationstechnik (BSI)
description: BSI's IT-Grundschutz — German standard methodology for information security management, with detailed protection-requirement modules. The methodology aligns with ISO/IEC 27001 with German-specific guidance.
relationToCloudSecurity: Cloud-component modules included in current IT-Grundschutz catalogs.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI systems within scope.
